wiki.extract: Optimum is an American telecommunications brand owned and operated by Optimum Communications, formerly Altice USA. It is the fourth-largest cable provider in the United States and a Fortune 500 company. Optimum offers Internet, television, mobile and home phone services in 21 states.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level from collapsing structure or equipment  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee climbed a ladder to drill holes in the side of a house for the installation of cables. The ladder slid from under the employee and they fell to the deck. The employee sustained fractures to their nose, left ankle, left shoulder, and a laceration on their right knee that required stitches.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was scraping mud from the inside edges of a mixer when his hand was caught by the paddles. The employee sustained a right hand fracture.

sampleRecords.employer: Optimum Altice USA Depot 708 N Ray Roberts Pkwy
sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was helping move a dock plate. As he grabbed the edge of the dock plate, it dropped to the truck deck and pinched his left middle finger, resulting in a fingertip amputation. The fingertip was surgically reattached.

sampleRecords.event_description: Thrown, fell, or jumped from animal being ridden
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Two employees were trying to pull a cow out of a ditch. After they got the cow out, one employee's horse got scared and started bucking. The employee fell from the horse and the rope became tangled around his neck, causing face and neck injuries.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in or compressed by equipment or objects, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee's left index fingertip was amputated by a power press.
